mapper.sql: id, user_id, shop_id, order_id, dish_score, service_score, environment_score, content, image_urls, reply_content, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.user_id, e.shop_id, e.order_id, e.dish_score, e.service_score, e.environment_score, e.content, e.image_urls, e.create_time, e.update_time, u.nickname as nickname, u.avatar as avatar, s.name as shop_name FROM evaluation e LEFT JOIN user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN shop s ON e.shop_id = s.id ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id,a.dish_score,a.service_score,a.environment_score,a.content,a.image_urls,a.create_time,a.update_time, b.phone,b.nickname, c.phone, e.product_id,e.quantity,e.price,e.amount,e.remark, f.shop_id,f.category_id,f.`name` FROM `evaluation` a INNER JOIN `user` b oN a.user_id=b.id INNER JOIN shop c oN a.shop_id=c.id INNER JOIN `order` d oN a.order_id=d.id INNER JOIN order_item e ON d.id=e.order_id INNER JOIN product f ON e.product_id=f.id WHERE a.shop_id=#{ShopId}

SELECT a.id,a.dish_score,a.service_score,a.environment_score,a.content,a.image_urls,a.create_time,a.update_time, b.phone,b.nickname,b.avatar, c.phone, e.product_id,e.quantity,e.price,e.amount,e.remark, f.shop_id,f.category_id,f.`name` FROM `evaluation` a INNER JOIN `user` b ON a.user_id=b.id INNER JOIN shop c ON a.shop_id=c.id INNER JOIN `order` d ON a.order_id=d.id INNER JOIN order_item e ON d.id=e.order_id INNER JOIN product f ON e.product_id=f.id ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
